lenses.name: Risk scan
lenses.prompt: most likely failure mode? most expensive failure mode? same or different?

lenses.name: Opportunity map
lenses.prompt: adjacent upside user isn't seeing? what if this works 3x better? what would a competitor do if they knew?

lenses.name: Execution audit
lenses.prompt: fastest path to test with real data? actual bottleneck? minimum viable test?

lenses.name: Assumption check
lenses.prompt: what is user assuming without stating? what changes if wrong? are they solving the right problem?
